data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. DRAGON BALL lines up for the first time. By Fear The Dragon and hails from the Brent McIntyre stable. Looks to have some talent based on a recent trial win. Makes plenty of appeal. 10. RAKATURBO turned in another strong performance last time when he battled on bravely to finish third over 2400m at Wyndham Raceway. Has the ability to find the winners' list. 5. HAVTIMEFORMIKI ended last prep with a seventh at this track over 1609m four months ago. Can open this campaign with a more positive effort. 9. CASH IS KING is in the mix after turning in a better effort last start to finish third at Ascot Park Raceway over 2200m.","runners":[4,10,5,9],"exclusive":false}
